title: elsholtzia pilosa
intro: Elsholtzia pilosa, also known as Vietnamese mint or country mint, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia, characterized by its fragrant leaves and purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, exhibiting antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Elsholtzia pilosa have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Elsholtzia pilosa is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
